query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS position_funding (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  position_id INT NOT NULL,
  funding_type ENUM('grant_funded', 'revenue_funded', 'mixed', 'donation_funded') NOT NULL,
  grant_id INT,
  funding_percentage DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 100.00,
  funding_start_date DATE,
  funding_end_date DATE,
  budget_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (position_id) REFERENCES laws_positions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

  position_id INT NOT NULL,
  funding_type ENUM('grant_funded', 'revenue_funded', 'mixed', 'donation_funded') NOT NULL,
  grant_id INT,
  funding_percentage DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 100.00,
  funding_start_date DATE,
  funding_end_date DATE,
  budget_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (position_id) REFERENCES laws_positions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
